column1: # Shared aontu unit tests. Columns (tab-separated): name<TAB>mode<TAB>src<TAB>expect
# mode: canon = unify(src).canon == expect ; gen = generate(src) deep-equals JSON(expect) ; err = generate(src) errors, message contains expect
# Escapes in src/expect: \n -> newline, \t -> tab, \\ -> backslash. Lines starting with # and blank lines are ignored.
